title: Augustana University Partnering With Levitt at the Falls’ Share the Stage Program
summary_en: Augustana University is partnering with Levitt at the Falls’ Share the Stage Program in support of local artists and their professional development. As a part of Augustana's sponsorship, the University will be hosting Share the Stage Opening Acts on five nights throughout the summer.
title_cn: 奥古斯塔纳大学与利维特瀑布“共享舞台”项目开展合作

title: Augustana Art Department Bestows Spitznagel Medal for Achievement to Three Graduating Artists
summary_en: The Augustana University Art Department has presented its highest award — the Harold Spitznagel Medal for Achievement in Art — to three graduating Augustana students during the opening reception of “The Augustana Senior Show” at the Eide/Dalrymple Gallery on Friday, May 1. This marks only the second time that three individuals have been honored with the award in one year.
title_cn: 奥古斯塔纳大学艺术系向三名应届毕业生授予哈罗德·斯皮茨纳格尔艺术成就奖章
